interpretation: Rows present in the source inventory export.
Rows usable for price, discount, inventory value, and stockout analysis.
Rows excluded from commercial calculations because price or weight is invalid.
Distinct product names after basic text cleaning.
Rows that repeat an existing commercial signature. This is a data-quality limitation, not a business claim.
Product names that appear under more than one category in the raw dataset.
Category groups with identical aggregate KPIs. These should be called out in interviews.
